name: Announcement!
description:
GOOOOOD MORNING~!

I’m gunna keep this brief because I’m not going to pretend to understand everything going on with JAI, but I know enough to understand this platform has a lot to not only work on but to make up for.

I will still post here for the time being, mostly because this other site is hard on mobile and I’m investing in a pc ☺️ I will post on both sites but mostly there once I get the hang of it unless janitor fixes the existing issues.

That being said, I’m thankful for you all and all the stories I got to share with you!

NOW onto more things! The discord is going through changes to make it more appealing to the eye, coordinated, and just overall easier to navigate.

Also!

✨FEBRUARY✨

Peg them February, I will be working on a calendar release that discord members have early access to, otherwise the rest of you will be surprised! We will peg a man each day!

✨MARCH MOMMY✨

March is for the ladiesssss!!

I’m making a female bot each day! I’m trying to force motivation for myself but with the new schedule feature it’s just going to work fine for me.

You won’t know it but I will be absent Feb12-16, why? IM GOING TO DHORRL’S AGAINNNN.

If you’re going to the anime con in Houston look for a Choso, Lucifer (maybe dabi) cosplayer! I’ll be working/helping at a booth!

Much love

Judas420
creator: Judas420
